NICHOLAS CHASE
M.S. Artificial Intelligence Candidate · Data Science · NJIT
Edgewater, NJ · nikechase@gmail.com · 269-350-0535 · LinkedIn · GitHub
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Graduate student in Artificial Intelligence at NJIT (GPA 3.75) with a B.S. in Software Development. Built and deployed a production web application — a resume and job description skill parser — using React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, and Stripe, shipped from scratch over 6+ months using agentic AI development with Claude Code. Seeking ML/AI or Data Science internships.
PROJECTS
Nat20 — Resume & JD Skill Parser May 2026 – Present
Personal Project · React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Stripe, Vercel
•
Built a full-stack SaaS web application that parses job descriptions and resumes to produce an actionable role readiness decision — independently designed the product logic, scoring model, and UX from scratch, applying problem-solving and decision-making at every layer of the system.
•
Researched occupational standards (OPM MOSAIC, Bloom's Revised Taxonomy, Lightcast skill taxonomy) to ground the scoring model in industry frameworks; designed and implemented a rule-based extraction engine with a 400+ skill dictionary and weighted evidence scoring.
•
Designed and built a 4-tab UI (React + Tailwind CSS) covering the full user flow from JD input to gap analysis output; configured Supabase (auth + database) and Stripe Checkout for a freemium subscription backend deployed on Vercel.
•
Managed full development lifecycle solo using agentic AI (Claude Code) — adapted architecture and tooling iteratively across 6+ months, making data-driven technical decisions from test results and real user feedback.
nat20 - project
Inventrack v1 — Inventory Management System 3 months
Champlain College: SDEV 435 · C#, Unity3D, SQLite, Git
•
Built a full inventory management application in a team software development course — designed the UI layout and user flow, implemented in Unity3D with SQLite for embedded data persistence.
•
Collaborated across a 3-person team using Git and Agile sprints, communicating requirements and coordinating deliverables to ship a functional product on schedule.

Completed a full software development lifecycle project with a 3-person team, coordinating via Slack and Git across design, build, and delivery phases.
